page: Amazon Web Services i8ge.12xlarge is a storage-optimized server powered by 48 dedicated AWS Graviton Neoverse-V2 ARMv9 cores running at 2.8 GHz. It features 384.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB per core. The instance is built on the AWS Nitro hypervisor and includes a massive 30,000 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, alongside a baseline network bandwidth of 75 Gbps. No GPUs are included in this configuration.

Benchmark results indicate exceptional capabilities in memory and data processing. The server achieves top-tier performance in large-block memory bandwidth for both read and write operations, as well as in PassMark memory and database operations. Multi-core performance is highly competitive, with Geekbench multi-core scores, software compilation, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression all ranking in the top tier. Static web serving throughput is also in the top tier, while Redis SET operations and multi-core stress-ng tests fall into the strong performance bracket. Single-core performance and LLM inference tasks generally register in the average range, though text generation with medium-sized models remains strong.

Given its high-density local NVMe storage and top-tier memory bandwidth, the i8ge.12xlarge offers a highly resource-dense profile for data-intensive applications. The combination of dedicated ARMv9 cores and massive local storage delivers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads that require high IOPS and large datasets without the overhead of network-attached storage. This server is highly suited for large-scale databases, high-throughput web serving, software compilation pipelines, and memory-intensive data processing tasks.
description: Amazon Web Services i8ge.12xlarge is a storage-optimized instance powered by 48 dedicated AWS Graviton Neoverse-V2 ARMv9 cores running at 2.8 GHz. Built on the Nitro hypervisor, it features 384.0 GB of memory and a massive 30,000 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, supported by a 75 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmarks show top-tier performance in memory bandwidth, database operations, software compilation, and static web serving, alongside strong multi-core processing capabilities. Single-core and LLM inference tasks perform in the average range. This resource-dense configuration provides excellent qualitative cost efficiency for data-intensive workloads by eliminating network storage bottlenecks. It is highly suited for large-scale databases, high-throughput web serving, and intensive data processing applications.
og_description: Amazon Web Services i8ge.12xlarge is a storage-optimized server featuring 48 dedicated ARMv9 Graviton cores, 384 GB of RAM, and 30,000 GB of local NVMe SSD storage for high-throughput database workloads.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services i8ge.12xlarge features 48 ARMv9 cores, 384 GB RAM, and 30,000 GB local NVMe SSD storage for demanding database and storage workloads.
tagline: A highly resource-dense, storage-optimized platform featuring massive local NVMe capacity and top-tier memory bandwidth for data-intensive enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by 48 dedicated AWS Graviton Neoverse-V2 ARMv9 cores at 2.8 GHz
Equipped with 384 GB of RAM and 30,000 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
Delivers top-tier memory bandwidth and database operation benchmarks
Features a 75 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on the Nitro hypervisor
